title: レースプランナー・ブライアン

text_block_list.text:
One day, Narita Brian is sitting in the library,
seemingly at her wits' end.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I don't get any of this. How the heck am I
supposed to make sense of the track layout?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, how do you not get a headache reading
all those books?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What did you say about my head?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your mood seems worse than usual today. Is
something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Never mind, it's nothing. Just ignore me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Go on. Given your demeanor, it appears you have
need of my assistance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Please. You can read minds now or something?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're simply an open book. You always have
been.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch. Fine... I got asked to organize a race for the
Fan Fest. It's one of my student council duties.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's why you've been staring at that track
layout.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Happy now? That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Stop acting so tough. Your vexation is written on
your face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Actually, I'm grappling with an issue that's
proving difficult to solve, even for me. Let's try
something.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We'll help each other—in return for my assistance,
I'd like you to handle my problem. Deal?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Help each other? I... guess that's fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! With that settled, this shouldn't take
long! We sisters will make this the best race ever!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're way too eager about this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am! It's not every day you ask for my
help!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And this is why, you know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Well, we can figure out the race thing later. What
issue are you having? Must be a big one if you're
asking for my help.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It is. Truthfully, it's a problem only you can solve.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But as long as you apply yourself, I'm sure you'll
be able to resolve the matter by the end of the
day. Now, come with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Quit messing around and tell me what to do
already.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I have a younger sister who detests
vegetables, and I wish for her to eat them without
any bellyaching.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: This should be child's play for you. Now, go on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Refusal is not an option. You've already agreed
to this. All right, good luck.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You set me up!
